text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Yayoi Sho, but as usual, Agnes
Tachyon is thinking about her research.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her like this makes me worry if she'll give
the race an honest effort or not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Declaring that she wouldn't slack off for an
important race that leads up to the Satsuki Sho,
Agnes Tachyon leaves the waiting room.
